commentText: Continous grind is the one thing on the list, besides staying in touch with feeling the body-minds needs of basics like movement, recovery/downtime in real time. But I should start making more time for socializing IRL right now ive noticed - thats easier to miss i find if its not around in the house

tags.reasoning: I'm asking a question to keep the conversation going and learn more about his situation.

reply: What i found working for me is doing 1hr/1hr or 2hr/2hr blocks of wake up/stay up &rest/sleep time. This makes quite 5-6 block instead of the typical, sleep all night, and then stay awake all day on a different timeschedule. Def easier to be "supernatural" with the first option, but then the night and evening socializing becomes less possible.

commentText: @Daniel Carter - I’ve had ideas and tried to write in the past - but ideas to actual story end up a frustrating hodge podge I put aside. All the asides seem similar as the idea remains, however, I’m thinking of SCRAPPING all and starting anew once I’ve learned AI, get comfortable, then let it flow.

tags.reasoning: FrancE is a female name, and the post is about writing and AI.

reply: It’s easier to edit a hodge podge than a blank page.
